Onboarding.step10Desc: To learn more about Ashyk Bilim, you can take our original courses at Toraighyrov University
Onboarding.step1Desc: Welcome to Ashyk Bilim, the LMS built for simplicity, usability and performance. Meet the new way to create, share and interact with educational content.
Onboarding.step2Desc: Courses are the main building blocks of Ashyk Bilim, they always contain Chapters and Chapters contain Activities.
Onboarding.step3Desc: Activities are the elements you can add to your Courses via Chapters: Dynamic Pages, Videos, Documents, Assignments and more coming soon.
Onboarding.step4Button: Learn more about Dynamic Pages and the Editor
Onboarding.step4Desc: Dynamic pages are pages with dynamic content like Notion pages, they can include different components like Quizzes, Images, Videos, Documents, etc.
Onboarding.step5Desc: Thought tools made for both teachers and students, context aware, they can answer based on your courses and the unique content you create within Ashyk Bilim
Onboarding.step6Desc: With User Groups, you can divide students into Groups and provide access to Courses depending on their needs
Onboarding.step7Desc: You can make your Courses available to search engines and non authenticated users or only grant access to authenticated users
Onboarding.step7Title: Choose whether or not to make Courses available on the Internet
Onboarding.step8Desc: Engage students with assignments, track their progress, and provide feedback through our intuitive grading system.
